title: coleus gibbosus
intro: Coleus gibbosus, also known as Indian Coleus or Coleus amboinicus, is a perennial plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to India and Sri Lanka. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Coleus gibbosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems, among others. Herbal preparations of Coleus gibbosus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Indian cooking for its flavor and medicinal properties.
